headline: Western Digital (WDC) Stock Looks Reasonable On Earnings While Cash Flow Looks Cheap
summary: Western Digital stock has delivered very large gains over the past three years, yet the current share price still sits at a steep discount to an intrinsic value estimate based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach. This creates a clear valuation tension for anyone looking at the recent rally. Western Digital has returned about 18x over the past three years, which places the current valuation squarely in the spotlight after such an extreme move. Investor expectations around AI driven...

headline: MU Vs Its Peers: A Lead With A Price Tag
summary: After a stunning +749% run over the last twelve months, Micron Technology (MU) stock has recently pulled back, trading at about $959.48 a share. The company sits at the heart of the AI buildout, supplying the critical memory chips that power modern data centers. Yet for investors, its position within its competitive group presents a puzzle. Micron trades at a premium 44.8 times earnings, more expensive than rival NVIDIA's 32.3 multiple, but its operating margin of 48% doesn't reach NVIDIA's 64.
